name: Weighted Pull-Up
cues: Pronated grip just outside shoulders; full hang to chin clear of bar; control the descent.

name: Weighted Dip
cues: Slight forward lean; elbows track about 45°; shoulders below elbows at the bottom; lock out without shrugging.

name: Weighted Muscle-Up
cues: False grip or deep pull; drive hard into the transition; keep the bar or rings close; finish with a full dip lockout.

name: Back Squat
cues: Brace before you move; hips back and down; hip crease below parallel; mid-foot pressure; drive knees out.

name: Chin-Up
cues: Supinated grip; pull elbows to the ribs; stay quiet in the hips; brief pause at the top.

name: Neutral-Grip Pull-Up
cues: Palms facing each other; full hang to chest toward the handles; wrists stacked under the bar.

name: Inverted Row
cues: Body rigid from heels to head; pull chest to the bar; squeeze shoulder blades; step feet farther to load more.

name: Barbell Row
cues: Hinge to about 45°; pull the bar to the lower ribs; no bounce; keep the low back neutral.

name: Face Pull
cues: Pull to face or ears; turn the hands out at the finish; keep the load light enough for clean reps.

name: Dead Hang
cues: Active hang: slight scap depression; neck long and relaxed; hold for time with quiet legs.

name: Scapular Pull-Up
cues: Arms stay straight; depress and retract the scapulae only; pause at the top; no elbow bend.

name: Ring Dip
cues: Turn rings out at the top; own the instability; full range each rep; stop if a shoulder pinches.

name: Front Squat
cues: Elbows high; torso upright; full depth; breathe and brace before each rep.

name: Romanian Deadlift
cues: Soft knees; hinge until you feel a hamstring stretch; bar close to the legs; spine neutral.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
cues: Tilt the pelvis under; raise the legs without swing; lower under control.

name: Band Curl
cues: Elbows pinned at the sides; full stretch to full squeeze; smooth tempo, no heave.

name: Band Triceps Extension
cues: Pin the elbows; extend fully each rep; use a band light enough for clean lockouts.

name: Pike Push-Up
cues: Hips high; head travels toward the floor between the hands; own full depth before adding load.

name: Overhead Press
cues: Brace glutes and core; bar path close to the face; lock out overhead without leaning back.

name: Push-Up
cues: Body in one line; chest to the floor; elbows about 45°; full lockout without sagging hips.
